_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: we noted that FT895 induced a relatively less active state in S462TY and T265 cells, whereas STS26T cells became more energetically active
details: Became more energetically active based on extracellular acidification (ECAR) measurements after FT895 treatment
